testcase.name: checkAll_logsHealthCheckResult
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-25T20:39:49.199+08:00 INFO 62892 --- [ main] c.r.proxy.service.ProxyHealthChecker : Proxy 127.0.0.1:1 all checks FAILED (2 protocols × 3 URLs, 229ms)

testcase.name: checkAll_multipleProxies_checksAll
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-25T20:39:49.480+08:00 INFO 62892 --- [ main] c.r.proxy.service.ProxyHealthChecker : Proxy 127.0.0.1:1 all checks FAILED (2 protocols × 3 URLs, 39ms) 2026-03-25T20:39:49.517+08:00 INFO 62892 --- [ main] c.r.proxy.service.ProxyHealthChecker : Proxy 127.0.0.1:2 all checks FAILED (2 protocols × 3 URLs, 37ms)

testcase.name: checkAll_updatesScoreAfterCheck
